description:
The ButtonParentUnderUser component takes in a slot and some optional parameters for parenting slots. When a IButton is pressed, this component will parent any slot provided to the user that pressed the button.

}}

fields.Root: The slot to parent to the user that pressed the button.
fields.FindObjectRoot: Looks upwards in the slot heirarchy to find the slot with the Object Root component, and then parents that slot instead to the user.
fields.UnparentWhenParented: Makes this component's parenting effects togglable.
fields.PreserveOriginalSpace: Keep track of the original space.
fields._originalSpace: The slot that represents the original space.

usage: Useful if you want certain slots to be parented to you when a button is pressed.
